feed.title: JMC-memo
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: WireGuard
entry.summary: This post will guide and help you how to install1 and use2 WireGuard. Install WireGuard VPN Server Prerequisites In this example3: My IP: 207.148.66.172 Network Name: emp1 s0 WorGuard is listining on port: 33333 Range private IP: 192.168.10.0/24 update the system $ apt update -y install utilyties (if not already installed) iptables: Iptables is an extremely flexible firewall...

entry.title: GPG
entry.summary: This post will guide and help you how to use gpg. Prerequistes gpg installed; if not installed $ apt update && install -y gpg Otherweise if you have docker installed so you can play with it in debian container $ docker run -ti --rm --name debian debian in the container install gpg $ apt update && apt install -y vim less tree gpg CLI Get gpg version $ gpg --version...

entry.title: Firewall secure home network
entry.summary: This post will guide you how to install nextcloud. Je dois ajouter tous cce que je pourrai trouver … Prerequistes server; docker; nginx proxy manager; ajouter les liens des la documentation … version: '3' services: jekyll-serve: image: jekyll/jekyll:4.0 volumes: - '.:/srv/jekyll' ports: - 4000:4000 command: 'jekyll serve' to run docker-compose $ dock...

entry.title: Dockerize nextCloud
entry.summary: This post will guide you how to install nextcloud. Je dois ajouter tous cce que je pourrai trouver … Prerequistes server; docker; nginx proxy manager; ajouter les liens des la documentation … version: '3' services: jekyll-serve: image: jekyll/jekyll:4.0 volumes: - '.:/srv/jekyll' ports: - 4000:4000 command: 'jekyll serve' to run docker-compose $ dock...

entry.title: Degoogled your phone
entry.summary: This post will guide you how to install GrapheneOS. Prerequistes Google Pixel; GrapheneOS version: '3' services: jekyll-serve: image: jekyll/jekyll:4.0 volumes: - '.:/srv/jekyll' ports: - 4000:4000 command: 'jekyll serve' to run docker-compose $ docker-compose up Errors Unable to monitor directories for changes because iNotify max watches exceeded...
